http.server/BaseHTTPRequestHandler/reque.name: request_version
http.server/BaseHTTPRequestHandler/reque.description: Contains the version string from the request. For example, 'HTTP/1.0'.

info.excerpt: Contains the version string from the request. For example, 'HTTP/1.0'.

http.server/BaseHTTPRequestHandler/reque.name: requestline
http.server/BaseHTTPRequestHandler/reque.description: Contains the string representation of the HTTP request line. The terminating CRLF is stripped. This attribute should be set by handle_one_request(). If no valid request line was processed, it should be set to the empty string.

info.excerpt: Contains the string representation of the HTTP request line. The terminating CRLF is stripped. This attribute should be set by handle_one_request(). If no valid request line was processed, it should b...

http.server/BaseHTTPRequestHandler/respo.name: responses
http.server/BaseHTTPRequestHandler/respo.description: This attribute contains a mapping of error code integers to two-element tuples containing a short and long message. For example, {code: (shortmessage, longmessage)}. The shortmessage is usually used as the message key in an error response, and longmessage as the explain key. It is used by send_response_only() and send_error() methods.

http.server/BaseHTTPRequestHandler/rfile.name: rfile
http.server/BaseHTTPRequestHandler/rfile.description: An io.BufferedIOBase input stream, ready to read from the start of the optional input data.

info.excerpt: An io.BufferedIOBase input stream, ready to read from the start of the optional input data.
